citation: VA M26-7 Topic 7 — West region, family of 4, loan >= $80k
comment: Hand-calc: West family-4, loan $400k → minimum_required $1,117. Actual $500 < $1,117 → fail. binding_rule_citation = 'VA-RESIDUAL-WEST-FAMILY-4' (must match pass-case format exactly so AFFD-07 sentinel is stable across pass/fail).
